blended.narrative: Eldora is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.3 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,858 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.1" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.8" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 32".
